title: baskaino #0940
definition:
1) to speak ill of one, to slander, traduce him
 2) to bring evil on one by feigning praise or an evil eye
 3) to charm, to bewitch
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to speak ill of one, to slander, traduce him
 2) to bring evil on one by feigning praise or an evil eye
 3) to charm, to bewitch

    NASB:  to slander, hence by ext. to bewitch:
